title: dortmanna subdentata
side_effects: Dortmanna subdentata can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in severe cases. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may lead to stomach issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Additionally, Dortmanna subdentata can interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, which may result in complications or decreased effectiveness. In rare cases, improper use of Dortmanna subdentata may also cause cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and changes in blood pressure.
